creator: jim@corp.au.triax.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	wmpinboard
#	wmpinboard/files
#	wmpinboard/files/md5
#	wmpinboard/pkg
#	wmpinboard/pkg/PLIST
#	wmpinboard/pkg/DESCR
#	wmpinboard/pkg/COMMENT
#	wmpinboard/Makefile
#
echo c - wmpinboard
mkdir -p wmpinboard > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - wmpinboard/files
mkdir -p wmpinboard/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - wmpinboard/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >wmpinboard/files/md5 << 'END-of-wmpinboard/files/md5'
XMD5 (wmpinboard-0.7.tar.gz) = 14351bdfee2987c2a9ba3455c9cd264d
END-of-wmpinboard/files/md5
echo c - wmpinboard/pkg
mkdir -p wmpinboard/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - wmpinboard/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >wmpinboard/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-wmpinboard/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/wmpinboard
END-of-wmpinboard/pkg/PLIST
echo x - wmpinboard/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >wmpinboard/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-wmpinboard/pkg/DESCR'
XPost-it notes for the WindowMaker dock or AfterStep Wharf.
END-of-wmpinboard/pkg/DESCR
echo x - wmpinboard/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >wmpinboard/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-wmpinboard/pkg/COMMENT'
XPost-it notes for the WindowMaker dock or AfterStep Wharf.
END-of-wmpinboard/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - wmpinboard/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >wmpinboard/Makefile << 'END-of-wmpinboard/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	wmpinboard
X# Version required:	0.7
X# Date created:		17 January 1999
X# Whom:			Jim Mock <jim@phrantic.phear.net>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	wmpinboard-0.7
XCATEGORIES=	misc deskutils
XMASTER_SITES=	http://www.tu-ilmenau.de/~gomar/stuff/wmpinboard/
X
XMAINTAINER=	jim@phrantic.phear.net
X
XLIB_DEPENDS=	Xpm.4:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/xpm
X
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/wmpinboard.app
X
XUSE_IMAKE=	yes
XNO_INSTALL_MANPAGES=	yes
X
Xdo-install:
X	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/wmpinboard ${X11BASE}/bin
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-wmpinboard/Makefile
exit
